report.title: Q1 Innovation Portfolio Review
report.subtitle: How our pilots tracked against the 2026 strategy and where to double down next quarter.
report.author: Strategy Office

summary.headline: Three of our four flagship pilots cleared the buy-stage gate this quarter, with the warehouse robotics initiative emerging as the strongest near-term adoption candidate.
takeaways: Warehouse robotics pilot exceeded throughput targets by 18%.
Two assessment-stage pilots were paused pending procurement clarification.
Pipeline diversity improved across logistics, energy, and quality assurance.

sections.title: Strategic alignment
sections.body: Pilots launched this quarter mapped cleanly to the three priority themes set in the 2026 strategy refresh. Coverage gaps remain in sustainability tooling, which the next sourcing wave will target.

sections.title: Operational health
sections.body: Cycle time from discover to buy improved from 112 to 84 days quarter-over-quarter as the standardized intake template rolled out across all business units.

appendix.methodology: Pilot data was aggregated from the central innovation tracker and validated with each business unit lead. Cycle-time figures reflect the median across closed pilots in the quarter.
